title: asclepias rubra var. laurifolia
intro: Asclepias rubra var. laurifolia, also known as the Red Milkweed or Red Butterfly Milkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Asclepias rubra var. laurifolia include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to prevent infections and promote healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through drying and infusing its leaves and stems, and can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
